• Articles (coming soon)

Ali Bińkowska

Hey, this is Ali. Welcome to my page.

For every "no" there is a path to "yes" - I don't take dead ends at face value. I love building new things, especially when technology is the lever. If there's a smarter way to do something, I want to find it.

I thrive in good collaboration and I'm equally comfortable pushing my own goals forward. I've built with public funding - now I'm focused on finding product-market fit for something I fully own.

Roles & activities
— Solopreneur | Product Manager · Nexi8

I help founders and business owners define goals, build metrics, and track what matters - through OKR sprints and Looker Studio dashboards.

— Occasional AI Engineer

I work on optimisation projects with a focus on OCR, bots, and chatbots - building tools that extract, process, and automate.

— AI Trainer · PAAI

I run AI training sessions helping teams and individuals work smarter with AI tools.

— Guest Lecturer · WSKZ

Occasional guest lectures on AI, product thinking, and building in the modern tech landscape.

Stack & tools
Claude Code Gemini Python n8n Looker Studio Canva Letterly Descript Lovable Supabase
